name: MedRealMM: A Real-World Multimodal Benchmark for Chinese Online Medical Consultation
summary: arXiv:2607.09142v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in online medical consultation, yet existing benchmarks remain poorly aligned with real cl...
description: arXiv:2607.09142v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in online medical consultation, yet existing benchmarks remain poorly aligned with real clinical practice. Many rely on synthetic conversations or patient simulators, omit patient-uploaded medical images, or evaluate open-ended clinical responses using multiple-choice or lexical-overlap me...
author: Runhan Shi, Quan Zhou, Yuqian Xu, Shuai Yang, Xin Wu, Zitong Zhou, Hui Liu, Bin Zha, Zheming Wang, Liya Li, Wei Wei, Haoyuan Hu, Jun Xu
